title: BEM-856 route after 855
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 08:37 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem855_verify_real_response_after_retry.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
queue_remaining=prev.get('queue_remaining',[])
created_files=[]
if ps=='real_claude_response_found':
    status='route_process_real_response'
    next_action='process real Claude response into agreed protocol'
elif ps=='real_response_still_missing_queue_remaining':
    status='route_process_queue_again'
    next_action='run another tick; queue still contains unprocessed items'
elif ps=='real_response_still_missing_queue_consumed_or_absent':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem856_claude_response_retry_after_consumed_queue.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-856 retry after prior queue consumed/absent but real Claude response missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='route_requeue_claude_response_retry'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response again'
else:
    status='route_unknown_bem855_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-855 status and mailbox state'
state={'bem':'BEM-856','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'queue_remaining':queue_remaining,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem856_route_after_bem855.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem856_route_after_bem855.md').write_text('# BEM-856 | Route After BEM-855 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem856_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. commit_sha null ignored.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-856'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem856_route_after_bem855.json','governance/reports/bem856_route_after_bem855.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem856_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-855 response verification and requeued Claude response retry if the previous queue was consumed or absent without a real response')
